def negative_environment_or_config_read_during_package_import():
    rule_id = "environment_or_config_read_during_package_import"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag package import paths that read environment or config eagerly."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
